case_title: RICHARD VINCENT CRAMER VS. BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS

docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 9/23/21-ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS-NO SUCH NUMBER/UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-09-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RICHARD VINCENT CRAMER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BOAS INTERNATIONAL MOTORS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF RICHARD VINCENT CRAMER IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SF HONDA REPRESENTED BY CHRIS HANSEN, PARTS AND SERVICE DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT STATED THAT THIS IS HIS SECOND APPEARANCES FOR THIS MATTER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
